creator: cpm@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Petermann from comment #0)

Hi Matthias,

I'm aware of this problem. It should be fixed after apply r444364 to affected ports:

security/py-acme
security/py-certbot

I still do not know why it was not successfully merged in r444601.

I'm waiting ports-secteam feedback.

Thanks for reporting.
